title: Thargoid Ships Destroyed
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(TotalReward), 0) AS totalReward FROM Bounty WHERE VictimFaction = 'Thargoid' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} confirmed Thargoid kill(s) earning {totalReward} Cr in AX bounties during the report period. Killing Thargoids is the most dangerous thing most commanders will attempt — a confirmed kill count represents real skill, proper preparation with Guardian weaponry, and the courage to face enemies that can neutralise an entire ship in moments.
details.help: Bounty VictimFaction = 'Thargoid' identifies AX kills. total drives the title as the confirmed kill count.

tagLines: Anti-xeno combat record compiled. Thargoid destruction events and associated bounty rewards noted.
They didn't go quietly. Killing a Thargoid requires preparation that most pilots never undertake.
Every Thargoid kill was a fight against something that was not designed to lose. You disagreed.
